query: UPDATE book_profiles SET rating = ROUND(CAST(rating AS DECIMAL(4,2)), 1) WHERE rating IS NOT NULL AND rating REGEXP '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2,}$';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute UPDATE book_profiles SET rating = ROUND(CAST(rating AS DECIMAL(4,2)), 1) WHERE rating IS NOT NULL AND rating REGEXP '^[0-9]+\.[0-9]{2,}$';
